name: Unboxing
description: ASMR-inspired unboxing flow. Package arrival through setup and first use. Satisfying, tactile, great for premium products. Works well without heavy voiceover.

scenes.description: Package arrives or hands reach for the box -- anticipation
scenes.footage_hint: Package on doorstep, hands picking up box, close-up of branded packaging

scenes.description: Opening the package -- reveal the product inside
scenes.footage_hint: Hands opening box, tissue paper, first glimpse of product

scenes.description: Full product reveal -- hold on the beauty moment
scenes.footage_hint: Product fully revealed, close-up of quality and detail

scenes.description: Tactile moment -- hands touching, feeling the quality
scenes.footage_hint: Hands on fabric/product, texture close-up, satisfying ASMR moment

scenes.description: Product in its final context -- setup complete
scenes.footage_hint: Product installed/placed in its environment, step back to admire
Wide shot of product in beautiful setting, CTA overlay
